title: pogostemon xanthiifolius
intro: Pogostemon xanthiifolius, also known as Patchouli, is a perennial herb native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Patchouli include reducing stress and anxiety, improving skin health, and boosting the immune system. Patchouli can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
